basicInfo.name: RC High-Speed Racing Car X1 Pro

features: USB-C fast charging (2 hours full charge)

sellingPoints: Professional-grade racing experience for young enthusiasts
Durable carbon fiber reinforced body withstands crashes
Long-lasting battery provides 40 minutes continuous play
Easy to control - suitable for beginners to intermediate users
Perfect gift for birthdays and holidays

aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionEn: Experience the thrill of high-speed racing with our X1 Pro! This professional-grade RC car features a powerful motor, advanced suspension, and sleek design. Perfect for young racers aged 8-14 who want real racing action.
aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionZh: 体验高速赛车的刺激！我们的X1专业版配备强劲电机、先进悬挂系统和流线型设计，为8-14岁的小赛车手带来真实的竞速体验。

marketingCopy.headlineEn: Unleash the Racer Within – X1 Pro RC Racing Car
marketingCopy.headlineZh: 释放内心的赛车手——X1专业版遥控赛车
marketingCopy.bodyEn: The X1 Pro isn't just a toy – it's a racing machine. With speeds up to 35km/h, precision 2.4GHz control, and professional drift capabilities, this RC car delivers authentic racing excitement. Built with durable carbon fiber reinforced ABS plastic, it withstands the toughest races and wildest stunts.
marketingCopy.bodyZh: X1专业版不仅是玩具，更是一台赛车机器。最高时速35公里、精准的2.4GHz控制和专业漂移功能，这款遥控车带来真实的竞速刺激。采用耐用的碳纤维增强ABS塑料制造，能够承受最激烈的比赛和最疯狂的特技。
